message:
fix(web): Fix incomplete ternary in database status rendering

Changed from invalid `{condition ? (element)}` to proper
`{(condition) && (element)}` pattern for conditional rendering.

The incomplete ternary was syntactically incorrect (missing else branch)
though TypeScript didn't catch it.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
